anticipated bounce growth likely tempered Hurricane Michael, which struck Florida Panhandle mid-October.
employment report should concerns economy slowing quickly really economy really shape," Sweet, senior economist Moody's Analytics Westchester, Pennsylvania.
Average hourly earnings forecast rising October after advancing September. would boost annual increase wages cent, biggest since April 2009, September.
Strong annual growth would mirror other published showing wages salaries rising third quarter since mid-2008. Hourly compensation increased brisk third quarter.

expected raise rates meeting Wednesday, economists believe strong labour market could central signal increase December. raised borrowing costs September third year.
